name: accounting firms managing 10–20 overdue invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, overdue invoices cause cash flow gaps. We provide a tracking tool instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking overdue client billing invoices.
